title: Issue with Email Tracking in Monday CRM’s Emails & Activities Section
excerpt:

posts.author: Timothy7 (Timothy Kariuki | CreativeBits LLC)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am experiencing an issue with the Emails & Activities section in Monday CRM. When I send an email from this section, it continues to show as “Not Seen” even after the recipient has opened it.

Additionally, when the recipient replies, I can see the response in the Emails & Activities section, but the original email gets marked as “Email could not be tracked.”

I have attached a screenshot for reference. Could you please assist in resolving this issue?

Thank you!

image896×525 37.4 KB

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: That sounds more of a glitch - have you reached out to support? support@monday.com

posts.author: Timothy7 (Timothy Kariuki | CreativeBits LLC)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes I have raised a ticket to the Monday support team I am waiting for their feedback
